GALATIA. Pessinus. Faustina Jr. (AD 147-175/176). AE (19mm, 7h). NGC Choice Fine, repatinated.  ΦΑΥϹΤΕΙΝΑ ΝΕΑ ϹΕΒΑϹΤΗ, draped bust of Faustina Junior right / ΠΕϹϹΙΝO-ΥΝΤΙΩΝ, Harpocrates, nude
sales.description:
Ancients
GALATIA. Pessinus. Faustina Jr. (AD 147-175/176). AE (19mm, 7h). NGC Choice Fine, repatinated.  ΦΑΥϹΤΕΙΝΑ ΝΕΑ ϹΕΒΑϹΤΗ, draped bust of Faustina Junior right / ΠΕϹϹΙΝO-ΥΝΤΙΩΝ, Harpocrates, nude, standing facing, head left, wearing tall headdress, right hand raised to mouth, cornucopia cradled in left arm. RPC IV.3 Online Temporary 10051.

Ex Numismatik Naumann, Auction 49 (8 January 2017), lot 462.
